caption: A man with a beard, wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap, and a headset, sits in a studio setting for a podcast. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone and a backdrop that features the text "HUSTLE" and stars. Across the frames, he is seen speaking and gesturing with his hands; in the first frame, he holds his right hand up and open, and in subsequent frames, he leans forward and shifts his facial expressions while talking. He wears a gold chain around his neck, and his shirt has "CHECK IT" visible on the chest. Overlaid on the video are logos that read "TALK 101 PODCAST" and "BOSS TALK 101". The background remains constant, while the man's movements and expressions convey an active conversation.
